schema_premise: In the German dataset, a token whose chars are de-admissible defaults to de under tier T2 (premise). T0/T1 are char-evidenced; T2 is defeasible.

tiers.description: char-evidenced family (family_and == {Germanic-Latn} only) — premise picks de over en/nl/da/nb/sv/is
premise (bitmask_and has de-bit; chars also admit other locales)
substrate (every in-scope locale admits all chars)
char evidence rules de out (token has a non-de-admissible char)
char tool cannot evaluate (partial_utf8 / byte_unmapped / special)
